Emerald Depths: Deep emerald, hunter green, moss, charcoal. Mysterious and dense, like ancient woodland shadows.
Autumn Ember: Burnt sienna, amber, rust, burgundy. Warm and nostalgic, capturing fallen leaves at dusk.
Moonlit Glade: Silver, slate blue, bone white, pale lavender. Cool and ethereal, bathed in lunar light.
Spring Whisper: Soft pink, mint, cream, butter yellow. Delicate and fresh, like morning dew on petals.
Biolume Dreams: Electric cyan, neon teal on deep black. Glowing and magical, mysterious underwater forest vibes.
Earth & Loam: Umber, ochre, terracotta, bark brown. Grounded and natural, rich forest floor essence.
Twilight Enchantment: Deep violet, plum, mauve, indigo. Mystical and dreamy, between day and night magic.
Frost Kiss: Ice blue, crystal white, pale mint, silver. Crisp and serene, winter's delicate touch.
Golden Hour Bloom: Honey, warm copper, amber, soft rose. Radiant and gentle, sunset filtering through leaves.
Dark Fable: Charcoal, deep forest, blood red, tarnished gold. Ominous and dramatic, Grimm fairy tale atmosphere.
Sage Tranquility: Sage green, soft gray-green, cream, muted olive. Calm and balanced, peaceful woodland meditation.
Copper Woods: Burnt orange, bronze, warm brown, golden ochre. Rich and inviting, harvest forest warmth.
Lavender Mist: Pale lavender, misty gray, soft white, dusty purple. Gentle and dreamy, fog-draped morning.
Fern Haven: Bright fern, lime green, yellow-green, spring moss. Vibrant and lively, new growth energy.
Phosphor Glow: Luminous green, electric blue, black, deep teal. Eerie and captivating, glowing fungal night.
Sandstone Clearing: Sandstone, warm beige, light ochre, cream. Warm and open, sun-dappled forest clearing.
Plum Shadow: Deep plum, dusty rose, mauve, charcoal. Sophisticated and moody, elegant twilight tones.
Winter Silence: Pale gray, ice white, cool blue-white, frost. Hushed and still, frozen forest peace.
Peach Dawn: Peach, soft coral, warm cream, gentle gold. Optimistic and tender, sunrise through branches.
Thorn & Ash: Dark gray, muted green, dried blood red, black. Brooding and gothic, cursed forest edge.
Moss Stone: Gray-green moss, slate, stone gray, lichen green. Cool and ancient, timeworn forest ruins.
Cinnamon Trail: Warm cinnamon, nutmeg brown, golden tan, rust. Spicy and cozy, autumn path wandering.
Pearl Fog: Pearl white, pale blue-gray, soft silver, misty lavender. Soft and obscured, ethereal forest veil.
Citrine Light: Bright yellow-green, lime, chartreuse, white-gold. Energetic and sunny, canopy filtered brilliance.
Obsidian Spell: Black, deep purple, midnight blue, dark crimson. Intense and powerful, witching hour magic.
